name: vehicle-vision-ocr
description: Vehicle Vision OCR - Offline Desktop Application

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:backend-x64: cd ../backend-dotnet && dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true
scripts.build:backend-x86: cd ../backend-dotnet && dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x86 --self-contained true
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend-x64 && npm run build:backend-x86 && npm run build:electron-x64 && npm run build:electron-ia32

author: Your Company
